changelog: Added: Settings view to toggle shuffling of the Citizen's Card, Class B License, Class A License, Main Gate Unlock, and Sub City Unlock.
Added: New chest icons for the actual in-game chest checks. (All other locations still use the default poptracker chest icons)
Changed: Checks added from 0.3.0, including (but not limited to); Unlock Main Gate, Unlock Sub-Cities, Yellow Refractor, Red Refractor, Citizen's Card, Class B License, and Class A License.
Changed: Logic updates to match the open
Changed: Optional flag for Jump Springs on Underground Zone 5 ledge checks due to logic refactoring.
Fixed: Logic for Clozer Woods Sub-Gate completion.
Changed: 'Gifts for Roll' now shows on multiple Support Car locations on the map.
Changed: Blue Refractor now shows as static instead of togglable.
Fixed: Logic for Underground Ruins checks that can be accessed via Drill Arm.
Added: Support for Archipelago location and item auto-tracking.
Added: Support for auto-tabbing based on the player's map location.
